payload.evidence: Repository-owned candidate integrated at 9ed52b4: Phase 5 5/5, adversarial 32/32 rejected, dogfood 1/1, Bash 3.2 forwarding 6/6, full premerge and 203 Rust tests pass. Live gate exits 2 because no authorized external trust registry or two pilot baselines exist.

payload.actions_taken: ["delegated writer and independent reviewer through Herdr","implemented dogfood and P0-P7 evidence contracts","closed trust identity tool and premerge oracle gaps","replayed Bash 3.2 and checkout-hygiene regressions","integrated six reviewed commits","ran focused and full premerge verification"]
payload.decisions_made: ["kept Phase 5 unaccepted until two unrelated authorized external pilots exist","required caller-pinned out-of-repository trust with a pinned digest","required distinct owner key repository and bundle identities","rejected any premerge route to dogfood-only mode","preserved the stale root database and used the isolated planning database"]
payload.errors: ["default root harness database belongs to an unavailable stale epoch","first candidate accepted structurally forged pilot evidence","second candidate allowed key and bundle aliases","premerge initially could not receive external trust inputs","macOS Bash 3.2 rejected empty-array expansion","full premerge exposed an unignored generated bridge binary"]
payload.harness_friction: The verified root database restore bundle is unavailable on this machine and external pilot owners have not authorized repositories or supplied trust material. Five writer-reviewer correction loops were required to close concrete oracle and portability gaps.
payload.notes: Repository-owned Phase 5 implementation is complete at primary commit 9ed52b4. Token estimate is unavailable because the orchestrator and persistent Herdr agent sessions account usage separately. Live verification still exits 2 by design. US-110 remains in_progress with e2e and platform proof unset; Phase 6 remains closed.
payload.task_summary: Integrated reviewed Phase 5 candidate with external pilot acceptance still blocked
